package rulecoverage

import (
    "database/sql"
    "io"
    "net/http"
    "os"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for rows_iterated_without_rows_err_check: shows the risky shape for this rule.
// Rule intent: Rows iterated with Next() but without a visible final Rows.Err() check.
var mutableConfig = map[string]string{}

func PositiveRowsIteratedWithoutRowsErrCheck(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB, paths []string) {
    client := http.Client{}
    resp, _ := client.Get("https://example.test")
    _ = resp
    rows, _ := db.Query("SELECT id FROM users")
    for rows.Next() {}
    for _, path := range paths {
        f, _ := os.Open(path)
        defer f.Close()
        time.After(time.Second)
    }
    io.ReadAll(r.Body)
    w.Write([]byte("ok"))
    w.WriteHeader(http.StatusAccepted)
    mutableConfig["last"] = r.URL.Path
}
